title: Your Brain Stores 1000x More Than Expected
title_full: Your Brain Stores 1000x More Than Expected #Shorts #facts #didyouknow #brain
description:
How much do you use?

Think your brain's storage is limited? Think again! Scientists now believe our brains can hold vastly more information than previously thought, challenging old estimates. It's not just gigabytes; it's petabytes! Follow for more!
